Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Goal Create a structured textual BPMN like process model based on provided interview transcripts regarding an Invoice Approval Process

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Inputs 1 Mary AP Clerk Receives invoice Checks PO existence No PO Return to supplier PO exists Log in system Forward to Purchasing Dan for receipt confirmation Get confirmation Match invoice vs PO Match Yes Send to Manager No Email Purchasing to clarify If unresolved Escalate to Supervisor Issue resolved and Manager approves Schedule payment 2 Dan Purchasing Officer Receives invoice from AP Compare details qty price with PO Issues Contact supplier or ask AP to hold for corrected version Correct Send confirmation email to AP Missing PO Tell Mary to get info 3 Carlos Dept Manager Receives notification after match and Dan confirmation Reviews details Good Approve Suspicious Issues Reject or ask AP to hold investigate Approve Goes to AP for payment 4 Rita AP Supervisor Handles escalations exceptions Mary cannot match unresolved discrepancy Escalate to Rita No PO informal services Create retrospective PO or reject Exception cleared Back to normal flow 5 Karen Supplier Relationship Mgr Involved if mismatch no PO Helps contact supplier for info revised invoice Checks contracts for pricing disputes

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Start Event Invoice Received by AP Clerk Task 1 Check for PO Number AP Clerk Gateway 1 XOR Is PO valid present No Return to Supplier for details Yes Log Invoice in System AP Clerk

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Task 2 Forward to Purchasing Request Receipt Confirmation AP Clerk Task 3 Verify Goods Services Receipt and Match Details Purchasing Officer

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Note Dan mentions checking PO details Mary mentions getting confirmation Lets group this as Purchasing Verification

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Gateway 2 XOR Is there a Discrepancy Yes Discrepancy found Sub process Task Resolve Discrepancy Actions Contact Supplier Karen Purchasing Check Contracts Karen Clarify with AP Dan Mary Hold Invoice Escalation If unresolved Escalate to Supervisor Rita Supervisor Action Retrospective PO or Reject or Coordinate Outcome Discrepancy Resolved Loop back to Verification or proceed to next step

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Mary says Once all issues are resolved send to manager Dan says Send confirmation Lets assume a loop until resolved then proceed

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: No Match confirmed Send Confirmation Purchasing Officer Task 4 Match Invoice to PO AP Clerk Mary mentions matching after getting confirmation

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Task 5 Review and Approve Invoice Department Manager Gateway 4 XOR Approval Decision Approve Process moves to payment Reject Hold Return to AP for investigation AP Clerk Task 6 Schedule Payment AP Clerk End Event Payment Scheduled

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Participants Lanes 1 Accounts Payable Mary Rita 2 Purchasing Dan 3 Management Carlos 4 Supplier Relations Karen Optional but useful for exception handling

Name: Inductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Handling Exceptions Variations Missing PO Mary returns to supplier Karen might help Discrepancy Price Qty Dan Mary identify Resolution involves Dan Karen Rita Informal Services No PO Rita handles Retrospective PO

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Consolidating Conflicts Mary matches after Dan confirms Dan compares before confirming This is sequential Mary sends to Dan Dan checks Dan confirms Mary matches system Mary sends to Manager

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Rita Supervisor handles No PO for informal services Mary sends back to supplier if no PO Rita says Sometimes we have invoices that dont match any PO create a retrospective PO This is an alternative path for No PO found in system but valid service

Name: Hypothesis Generation - IND
Text: Lets model this as a termination or return path Lets assume it ends that instance and a new one starts later or its an interrupting loop Best practice Loop back to Validate PO Presence after supplier acts

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: The model will show Dans check first then Marys system update

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Detailed Flow Logic 1 Start Event Invoice Received by AP 2 Task AP Validate PO Number 3 Gateway XOR PO Exists Path A No PO Task AP SRM Request Supplier Details Correction Task AP Supervisor Exception If valid but missing PO informal service Create Retrospective PO Loop back to Validate PO Number or Log Invoice depending on outcome Path B PO Exists Task AP Log Invoice in System Task AP Forward to Purchasing for Verification 4 Task Purchasing Verify Receipt and Compare Details vs PO 5 Gateway XOR Is there a Discrepancy Path A Discrepancy Task Purchasing SRM Investigate Contact Supplier Gateway XOR Resolved No Task AP Supervisor Escalate and Resolve Coordinate Retro PO Reject Yes Proceed Flow joins back to Main Path Path B No Discrepancy Task Purchasing Send Confirmation to AP 6 Task AP Match Invoice to PO in System 7 Task AP Submit for Manager Approval 8 Task Manager Review Invoice and Budget 9 Gateway XOR Approve No Task AP Hold and Investigate Potential loop back to Purchasing or Escalation Yes Task Manager Approve in System 10 Task AP Schedule Payment 11 End Event Invoice Scheduled for Payment

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Ambiguities to note The exact trigger for the Retrospective PO versus Send back to supplier The exact interaction between Dan and Mary regarding the System Match
